data.title: 14 Arnold & Itkin attorneys are recognized in 2025 Texas Super Lawyers & Rising Stars; 9 named Super Lawyers.
data.description: In Houston on September 19, 2025, the legal firm Arnold & Itkin LLP, situated in Houston, specializing in personal injury cases, received recognition in the 2025 edition of Texas Super Lawyers® and Super Lawyers® Rising Stars™ from Thomson Reuters. A total of 14 attorneys from Arnold & Itkin were acknowledged, with nine of them selected for the Super Lawyers designation.

data.title: Aspen Power acquired 6.85 MW solar projects in Pennsylvania, expanding their clean energy portfolio.
data.description: In a recent update on September 9, 2025, Aspen Power has expanded its Pennsylvania portfolio with the acquisition of new solar projects. The company has closed a deal with Syncarpha for sites totaling 6.85 MW. Aspen Power, known for its focus on distributed generation and commitment to advancing clean energy initiatives, finalized the acquisition to further bolster its presence in the region.

data.title: AOFAS Annual Meeting 2025 in SCHAUMBURG, Ill. attracted 1,100+ attendees, focusing on advancements in orthopaedics.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois on September 19, 2025, over 1,100 individuals including foot and ankle orthopaedic surgeons, advanced health practitioners, orthopaedic residents, and medical students gathered at the American Orthopaedic Foot & Ankle Society event. They came together to recognize leaders in the field who have made significant contributions to foot and ankle orthopaedics.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market on a dip with Bitcoin at $115,346.95, Ethereum $4,461.67, XRP $3.00, Dogecoin $0.2656. 120,795 traders liquidated for $321.54M. Laos exploring crypto mining.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a downturn on Friday, wiping out all gains made after FOMC. Prices for select cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $115,346.95, Ethereum at $4,461.67, Solana at $237.58, XRP at $3.00, Dogecoin at $0.2656, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001287. In the past 24 hours, Coinglass data reveals 120,795 traders were liquidated, resulting in a total loss of $321.54 million. Leading losers in the same period include MYX Finance, Fartcoin, and SPX6900. In other news, Laos is considering using excess hydropower for crypto mining to address debt issues. Brera Holdings rebrands as Solmate and sees a 225% surge following the announcement regarding Solana. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed cuts benchmark interest rate to 4.00%-4.25% after Trump pressure. 4th cut in easing cycle, signaling possible further cuts. Job gains slowed with only 22,000 new jobs in August. Unemployment remains low.
data.description: The Federal Reserve has cut its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.00%-4.25%, marking the fourth cut in the current easing cycle. This decision, influenced by President Trump's pressure, ends a nine-month policy pause, with policymakers hinting at further easing. Job gains have slowed, with the August nonfarm payrolls report showing only 22,000 new jobs created, a significant drop from July's 79,000. The average monthly job gain over the last three months has fallen to 29,000, indicating stagnation in employment trends. Despite not being a unanimous decision, this move is aimed at addressing the weakening job market and signals potential future rate cuts.

data.title: St. Johns County receives $1 million for Florida Black History Museum, celebrates historic milestone with state leaders.
data.description: Leaders from the state and local community came together in St. Johns County, Florida on September 18, 2025, to commemorate a significant milestone. The State of Florida has allocated $1 million for future planning and development in the county. The event served as a tribute to the accomplishments of the past while emphasizing the importance of investing in a prosperous future. This gathering symbolized cooperation and unity among state and community officials in advancing the strategic growth of St. Johns County.

data.title: Allegheny General Hospital to host filming for 'THE PITT' Season Two, a Warner Bros. series, in Pittsburgh.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, Allegheny General Hospital (AGH) of Allegheny Health Network (AHN) will be featured in the renowned Max Original drama series, 'THE PITT,' by Warner Bros. Television. The hospital will serve as a backdrop for the series, as production resumes.

data.title: Logicalis US selected for 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Technology™ List, underscoring commitment to employees.
data.description: Logicalis US, a prominent global technology services provider based in TROY, Mich., has recently achieved the prestigious recognition of being included in the 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Technology™ List. This acknowledgment highlights the company's dedication to creating a positive work environment, further solidifying its status as a Great Place to Work. This achievement underscores Logicalis US's commitment to its employees and reflects its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: EU agency approves Merck's Keytruda for new administration routes (SC) with recommended dosages of 395mg every 3 weeks or 790mg every 6 weeks.
data.description: On Friday, the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) issued two favorable opinions for Merck & Co. Inc.'s Keytruda (pembrolizumab). The first opinion recommends approving a new subcutaneous (SC) administration route and a solution for injection formulation. If granted approval, Keytruda SC could be given in just one minute every three weeks at a dosage of 395 mg, or in two minutes every six weeks at a dosage of 790 mg. This positive development applies to all KEYTRUDA indications for adult patients in Europe.

data.title: Trump hints TikTok deal with China progressing after call with Xi Jinping, but specifics remain uncertain.
data.description: Following a conversation with China's President Xi Jinping, the president expressed gratitude on Truth Social for the approval on TikTok. However, he indicated that discussions regarding the deal and other matters were ongoing.

data.title: TVA and Type One Energy partner to develop 350MW fusion power plant at Bull Run Fossil Plant for energy demands.
data.description: TVA and Type One Energy have strengthened their partnership to develop a 350-megawatt fusion power facility at TVA's prior Bull Run Fossil Plant location in Oak Ridge, Tennessee. This collaboration emphasizes TVA's pioneering role in advanced nuclear technology to meet the increasing energy needs...
